title: DT_BuildObjectDataTable
description: Palworld DataTable DT_BuildObjectDataTable (row struct: PalBuildObjectData). Each PalSchema mod patch targeting "DT_BuildObjectDataTable" is an object of rowName -> partial row; this schema validates one such row. Palworld 1.0. Field names verified against the current game's row struct (localcc/PalworldModdingKit@62fad41, pushed 2026-07-11); types inferred from game data (Jan-2024 dump) for long-standing fields and mapped from C++ for newer ones. Fields are optional (partial patches).
